overall.description: Gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a vehicle driving through a futuristic elevated highway system during golden hour. The camera moves from a shadowed underpass into sunlit urban canyons lined with digital billboards and glass skyscrapers, eventually turning into a plaza area.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated highway underpass with concrete infrastructure

events.description: vehicle exits shadow of overpass into direct golden hour sunlight

agents.ego_description: driving under elevated highway structure, emerging from shadow into sunlight

segments.scene_description: The vehicle drives beneath a massive concrete overpass in a futuristic city, transitioning from deep shadow into warm golden hour sunlight. Industrial ventilation structures and digital billboards line the right side while elevated highway ramps curve overhead.

segments.scene_description: Now fully in sunlight, the vehicle travels along an elevated highway flanked by massive digital billboards and a curved glass skyscraper. Palm trees line the right side while an elevated transit rail runs parallel on the left, with moderate traffic flowing in both directions.

segments.scene_description: The vehicle approaches an overhead traffic gantry with illuminated directional signs while driving past neon-lit building facades. The concrete barrier runs along the left side as the highway continues through the dense urban canyon.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban plaza with parking structure and crashed vehicle

events.description: executing right turn off the main highway ramp into plaza area

agents.ego_description: turning right off the highway into a plaza area, slowing to observe crashed vehicle ahead

segments.scene_description: The vehicle executes a right turn off the main highway into an open plaza area. A crashed vehicle sits in the center of the plaza near a multi-story parking garage, while the camera slows to navigate the turn away from the main traffic flow.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous vehicle journey that transitions from the deep shadows of an industrial underpass into a sun-drenched futuristic urban canyon before exiting into an open plaza. It begins beneath a massive concrete overpass, moving from darkness into warm golden hour sunlight as industrial ventilation structures and curving highway ramps pass overhead. As the vehicle emerges fully into the light, the environment opens up into a corridor of massive digital billboards, palm trees, and a curved glass skyscraper with a parallel transit rail. The scene then pushes forward past neon-lit facades and an illuminated traffic gantry, maintaining a steady flow through the dense city architecture. Finally, the camera slows as the vehicle executes a right turn off the main highway, shifting away from the traffic flow and into an open plaza featuring a crashed vehicle and a multi-story parking garage.
